evals.prompt: say 'the spice must flow' in a dramatic voice
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize text using a dramatic voice (e.g. galadriel, picard) and play it via afplay

evals.prompt: what voices do I have available on my TTS server?
evals.expected_output: Should query localhost:7860/health and list all available voices

evals.prompt: set up this project to use the river-song voice by default, and clara-oswald for the Explore agent
evals.expected_output: Should create/edit .afterwords file with default: river-song and Explore: clara-oswald

evals.prompt: read this error message aloud so I can hear it
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize the error text and play via afplay using default voice

evals.prompt: clone Morgan Freeman's voice from this YouTube video: https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123
evals.expected_output: Should run clone-voice.sh with the URL and a suitable voice name like 'morgan-freeman'

evals.prompt: let me hear what the snape voice sounds like
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize a short sample with voice=snape and play it as a preview

evals.prompt: the afterwords server isn't responding, can you fix it?
evals.expected_output: Should check server status, check logs, and attempt restart via afterwords.sh

evals.prompt: speak this paragraph in Picard's voice: We have engaged the Borg.
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize the text with voice=picard and play via afplay

evals.prompt: which voice should I use for a calm, authoritative narrator?
evals.expected_output: Should suggest appropriate voices from the available set (e.g. attenborough, galadriel, picard) based on tone

evals.prompt: preview all the voices so I can pick one
evals.expected_output: Should query /health for voice list, then synthesize and play a short sample for each voice sequentially

evals.prompt: I need to upload an audio file and clone a voice programmatically via the API
evals.expected_output: Should explain POST /clone endpoint with multipart form upload, session_id, emotion params. Mention --allow-clone requirement.

evals.prompt: synthesize speech with a cheerful emotion using a cloned voice palette
evals.expected_output: Should use POST /synthesize with JSON body including emotion parameter. Mention --allow-clone requirement.

evals.prompt: write a Python function to sort a list
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger the afterwords skill — this is a general programming task
Should NOT trigger the afterwords skill — this is a deployment task

evals.prompt: clean up my session's cloned voices on the TTS server
evals.expected_output: Should use DELETE /session/{session_id} endpoint. Mention --allow-clone requirement.
